_meta.description: Production retrieval quality baseline — captured before RAG initiative implementation begins. Floor: no phase may land below these values.
_meta.initiative: RAG and Agentic System Architecture Initiative
_meta.note: Values sourced from documented production baseline. Live eval requires access to Qdrant at server36 cluster. Re-run to verify freshness before Phase 3 begins.

eval_runner.requires: Qdrant accessible at configured QDRANT_URL (server36 cluster)

nDCG_at_5.description: Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain at rank 5 — quality of ranked result ordering

MRR.description: Mean Reciprocal Rank — how quickly the first relevant result appears

P_at_5.description: Precision at rank 5 — fraction of top-5 results that are relevant

R_at_5.description: Recall at rank 5 — all relevant docs found within top-5

floors.note: P3.6 gate: nDCG@5 >= 0.90 on pilot scope. P4 exit gate: nDCG@5 >= 0.925 across all scopes.

w_series_outcomes.W2_hybrid_BM25_dense: frozen — insufficient improvement on pilot corpus; reopen requires >= 3% nDCG@5 delta on post-Pathway corpus (P5 gate)
